mappings.rationale: Directly covers urban planning, infrastructure systems, and the design of recreational facilities and public services.
Relevant to basic engineering services including water-supply systems, sanitation systems, and urban infrastructure.
Covers the engineering principles underlying urban water, sanitation, and transportation systems.
Relevant to urban transportation systems, engineering services, and the technological challenges of suburban expansion.
Relevant to control of air, water, and land pollution, a key technological response to urban problems.
Relevant to the economic analysis of pollution control and environmental regulation in urban communities.
Relevant to the regulatory frameworks for controlling air, water, and land pollution in cities.
Relevant to the political dimensions of urban pollution control and environmental regulation.
Relevant to ethical considerations in pollution control and the provision of basic urban services.
Relevant to sustainable urban infrastructure, water management, and pollution control technologies.
Relevant to water-supply and sanitation systems as fundamental urban public health infrastructure.
Relevant to crime control technology used in urban police services.
Relevant to crime control technology and policing methods in urban communities.
Relevant to police technology and crime control in urban settings.
Relevant to water-supply systems and the chemistry of water treatment for urban communities.
Relevant to the design and maintenance of parks, recreational facilities, and urban green spaces.
Relevant to fire prevention and control as a basic engineering service of the city.
